mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, clazz_id, name, gender, birth_date, university, phone, email, wechat, qq, message, avatar, create_time, update_time FROM student_profile ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_profile (user_id, clazz_id, name, gender, birth_date, phone, university, email, wechat, qq, message, avatar, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{clazzId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{phone}, #{university}, #{email}, #{wechat}, #{qq}, #{message}, #{avatar}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE student_profile SET user_id = #{userId}, clazz_id = #{clazzId}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, phone = #{phone}, university = #{university}, email = #{email}, wechat = #{wechat}, qq = #{qq}, message = #{message}, avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, clazz_id, name, gender, birth_date, university, phone, email, wechat, qq, message, avatar, create_time, update_time FROM student_profile ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT c.id as clazzId, c.name as clazzName, COUNT(sp.id) as studentCount FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON c.id = sp.clazz_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.id ASC
SELECT gender, COUNT(*) as count FROM student_profile GROUP BY gender ORDER BY gender ASC

SELECT id, user_id, clazz_id, name, gender, birth_date, university, phone, email, wechat, qq, message, avatar, create_time, update_time FROM student_profile WHERE clazz_id = #{clazzId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, user_id, clazz_id, name, gender, birth_date, university, phone, email, wechat, qq, message, avatar, create_time, update_time FROM student_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
